'''Eixes Valorum''' was a member of the [[House Valorum/Legends|Valorum family]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. He eventually became a [[Senator/Legends|senator]] and later served as [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]], some time prior to [[62 BBY/Legends|62 BBY]]. His Chancellorship was first proposed at one of the annual elite gatherings on the [[Sojourn (moon)|Sojourn]] moon hosted by [[Caar Damask]], and was known for a sense of style not seen again until the chancellorship of [[Thoris Darus]].<ref name="Darth Plagueis novel">[[Darth Plagueis (novel)|''Darth Plagueis'']]</ref>

He was the last Supreme Chancellor to give a [[State of the Republic address]] prior to [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]].<ref name="Labyrinth of Evil">''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
In ''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]'', he is named as '''Valorum Eixes'''. This is likely an editing mistake, as nowhere else is the family name given first. He is referred to as Eixes Valorum in [[Darth Plagueis (novel)|''Darth Plagueis'']].
